_notes: Ready-to-paste JSON-LD blocks for each page on mapoolsconstruction.co.za. Each entry's `script` field is a complete <script type="application/ld+json">...</script> tag. Replace placeholder values (telephone, geo, aggregateRating) with verified data before launch. LocalBusiness subtype chosen: HomeAndConstructionBusiness — best Schema.org match for a pool service firm operating across a service area in Gauteng (the deprecated/Yelp-only `SwimmingPoolCleaning` was avoided).
_placeholder_warning: telephone, geo coordinates, aggregateRating, sameAs URLs, and openingHours are PLACEHOLDERS. Replace before going live.

sitewide_local_business.script:
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": ["LocalBusiness", "HomeAndConstructionBusiness"],
  "@id": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/#business",
  "name": "Ma Pools Construction",
  "legalName": "Ma Pools Construction",
  "description": "Pool construction, renovations, repairs and care across Gauteng — director-led.",

  "logo": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/favicon.svg",
  "image": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/assets/images/og-aquaestate-default.jpg",
  "telephone": "+27787122157",
  "email": "mapoolsconstruction@gmail.com",
  "priceRange": "RRRR",
  "foundingDate": "2014",
  "slogan": "New builds, renovations, and dependable pool care across Gauteng.",
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "streetAddress": "331B Utekwane Street, Zone 7",
    "addressLocality": "Meadowlands",
    "addressRegion": "Gauteng",
    "postalCode": "2196",
    "addressCountry": "ZA"
  },
  "geo": {
    "@type": "GeoCoordinates",
    "latitude": -26.10760,
    "longitude": 28.05680
  },
  "areaServed": [

    { "@type": "City", "name": "Gauteng" },
    { "@type": "City", "name": "Johannesburg" },
    { "@type": "City", "name": "Pretoria" },
    { "@type": "City", "name": "Centurion" },
    { "@type": "City", "name": "Midrand" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Gauteng" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Gauteng" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Meadowlands" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Houghton" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Waterkloof" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Gauteng project" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Gauteng project" },
    { "@type": "Place", "name": "Gauteng project" }
  ],
  "openingHoursSpecification": [
    { "@type": "OpeningHoursSpecification", "dayOfWeek": ["Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday"], "opens": "07:30", "closes": "17:30" },

  ],
  "sameAs": [
    "https://www.instagram.com/mapoolsconstruction",
    "https://www.facebook.com/mapoolsconstruction",
    "https://www.linkedin.com/company/ma-pools-construction"
  ],

    "@type": "AggregateRating",
    "ratingValue": "4.9",
    "reviewCount": "47",
    "bestRating": "5",
    "worstRating": "1"
  }
}
</script>

testimonials_page.script:
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LocalBusiness",
  "@id": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/#business",
  "name": "Ma Pools Construction",
  "url": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/",
  "aggregateRating": {
    "@type": "AggregateRating",
    "ratingValue": "4.9",
    "reviewCount": "47",
    "bestRating": "5",
    "worstRating": "1"
  },
  "review": [
    {
      "@type": "Review",
      "reviewRating": { "@type": "Rating", "ratingValue": "5", "bestRating": "5" },
      "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Dr. Alistair Vance" },
      "reviewBody": "The level of professionalism displayed by Ma Pools Construction is unmatched in Gauteng. My pool has never looked more inviting, and the peace of mind they provide is priceless.",
      "itemReviewed": { "@id": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/#business" }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Review",
      "reviewRating": { "@type": "Rating", "ratingValue": "5", "bestRating": "5" },
      "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Sarah Whittaker" },
      "reviewBody": "Their chemical balance precision is surgical. We no longer worry about skin irritation or water clarity.",
      "itemReviewed": { "@id": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/#business" }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Review",
      "reviewRating": { "@type": "Rating", "ratingValue": "5", "bestRating": "5" },
      "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Marcus de Villiers" },
      "reviewBody": "Ma Pools Construction doesn't just clean; they curate. The technicians are always punctual, polite, and thorough.",
      "itemReviewed": { "@id": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/#business" }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Review",
      "reviewRating": { "@type": "Rating", "ratingValue": "5", "bestRating": "5" },
      "author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Elena Kostas" },
      "reviewBody": "Reliability is a rare commodity. Ma Pools Construction has consistently exceeded our high expectations for three years.",
      "itemReviewed": { "@id": "https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/#business" }
    }
  ]
}
</script>

breadcrumb_template._notes: Duplicate this block on each non-home page and adjust `name` and `item` for the page's path.

faq_page_template._notes: FAQ rich results are RESTRICTED to government/healthcare authority sites as of August 2023. The site has no FAQ content yet. If FAQ content is added later, this block can be re-evaluated, but rich results are unlikely. The schema below is provided as a structural reference only — do NOT publish until FAQ content exists in visible HTML.
faq_page_template.script:
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "How often should a pool be serviced?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "For high-capacity pools in Gauteng, Ma Pools Construction recommends weekly service year-round to maintain water chemistry balance, prevent algae bloom, and protect the pool's mechanical and structural integrity."
      }
    }
  ]
}
</script>
